description: Maps every BullMQ queue produced by a deployed app to the deployed service that consumes it. Used by tools/scripts/check-queue-consumers.mjs to catch un-consumed queues in CI.

ai-scoring.notes: Lead scoring jobs — consumed by AIWorker.processJob (SCORING_QUEUE)

ai-prediction.notes: Churn / NBA / qualification predictions — consumed by AIWorker.processJob (PREDICTION_QUEUE)

ai-feedback-analytics.notes: Feedback analytics cron — scheduled and consumed by AIWorker (FEEDBACK_ANALYTICS_QUEUE)

ai-memory-retention.notes: Memory retention sweep cron — scheduled and consumed by AIWorker (MEMORY_RETENTION_QUEUE)

ai-enrichment.notes: Contact / account enrichment (IFC-312) — consumed by AIWorker case ai-enrichment

ai-entity-insight.notes: Entity insight generation (IFC-312) — consumed by AIWorker case ai-entity-insight

ai-reply-draft.notes: Reply draft generation (IFC-312) — consumed by AIWorker case ai-reply-draft

ai-account-scoring.notes: Account scoring (IFC-312) — consumed by AIWorker case ai-account-scoring

ai-tag-suggestion.notes: Tag suggestion (IFC-312) — consumed by AIWorker case ai-tag-suggestion

intelliflow-contact-embed.notes: Contact embedding for duplicate detection (IFC-310) — consumed by ContactEmbedWorker booted in AIWorker.bootContactEmbedWorker

intelliflow-text-extraction.notes: Document text extraction — consumed by bootIngestionWorkers (D5 / issue #259). Processors: TextExtractionProcessor-equivalent in workers/ingestion-workers.ts

intelliflow-ocr-processing.notes: Image OCR — consumed by bootIngestionWorkers (D5 / issue #259). Processor: OCRWorker from workers/ocr-worker.ts

intelliflow-document-reindex.notes: Document re-indexing / embedding generation — consumed by ReindexWorker (IFC-155). Wired via IngestionWorker.processEmbedding delegate path.

intelliflow-notifications-email.notes: Email notifications — consumed by notifications-worker email channel

intelliflow:webhook-delivery.notes: Webhook delivery — consumed by events-worker subscription bridge

intelliflow-ticket-sla-monitor.notes: Ticket SLA breach monitor cron (PG-185) — consumed by TicketSlaMonitorWorker in ai-worker

intelliflow-ticket-auto-close.notes: Ticket auto-close sweep cron (PG-185) — consumed by TicketAutoCloseWorker in ai-worker

intelliflow-ticket-ai-automation.notes: Ticket AI automation jobs — consumed by processTicketAiAutomationJob in ai-worker

intelliflow-deal-ai-automation.notes: Deal AI automation jobs — consumed by processDealAiAutomationJob in ai-worker

intelliflow-case-deadline-monitor.notes: Case deadline monitor cron — consumed by CaseDeadlineMonitorWorker in ai-worker

intelliflow-embedding-generation.notes: Embedding generation (visible on Bull Board dashboard); consumed indirectly via intelliflow-document-reindex delegation path

ai-case-ai-automation.notes: Case AI automation jobs — consumed by processCaseAiAutomationJob in ai-worker
